name: jj-ai-dispatcher
description: Local dispatcher for routing small controlled tasks to local AI workers and utility scripts. It reduces manual copy/paste between ChatGPT, Codex, Co-Claw/OpenClaw, and Git.

scripts.build: node --check mcp/server/index.js && node --check mcp/server/server.js && node --check mcp/server/bridgeClient.js && node --check mcp/server/errors.js && node --check mcp/config/loadConfig.js && node --check mcp/tools/index.js && node --check mcp/tools/schemas.js && node --check scripts/review-latest-run.mjs
